Corfu So many things to discover... Vlaherna Convent Mouse Island Paxos Antipaxos Meteora The "Suspended in Mid-Air" Monasteries

Welcome to the Island of Corfu
Moraitika Village

Moraitika is one of the fastest growing areas along Corfu’s South East coast.
Away from the main road situated at the side of Messonghi River.
It is one of Corfu’s friendliest seaside resorts…

More

Fly Over Moraitika
Copyright by Christos Servos drones Corfu
